package rulecoverage

func PositiveTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSub() string {
    ruleID := "time_since_candidate_via_now_sub"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`time.Now().Sub(start)` instead of `time.Since(start)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
